questions.question: Вона сказала, що живе там.
questions.target_text: She said that she lived there.

questions.question: Він сказав, що працює.
questions.target_text: He said that he was working.

questions.question: Вони сказали, що закінчили.
questions.target_text: They said that they had finished.

questions.question: Вона сказала, що бачила це.
questions.target_text: She said that she had seen it.

questions.question: Він сказав, що зателефонує.
questions.target_text: He said that he would call.

questions.question: Вона сказала, що може допомогти.
questions.target_text: She said that she could help.

questions.question: Він сказав, що мусить піти.
questions.target_text: He said that he had to leave.

questions.question: Вона каже, що втомлена.
questions.target_text: She says that she is tired.

questions.question: Учитель сказав, що вода кипить при ста градусах.
questions.source_text_uk: Учитель сказав, що вода кипить при ста градусах.
questions.target_text: The teacher said that water boils at one hundred degrees.
